calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-25-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Albert Boasberg, Esq. for Plaintiff: Nick Roomel, ind and as Administrator of the Estate of Russell Lee Scott, Deceased, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: David MacCharles.
Matter is submitted and under submission.
Proposed Judgment rec'd in court.
